_meta.workshop_title: RAG Patterns in Practice — From Naive to Agentic

foundational.label: Foundational
foundational.description: Baseline patterns every other pattern builds upon

retrieval_enhancement.label: Retrieval Enhancement
retrieval_enhancement.description: Techniques that improve what gets retrieved and how

indexing_chunking.label: Indexing & Chunking Strategies
indexing_chunking.description: How documents are stored and structured for optimal retrieval

reasoning_self_correction.label: Reasoning & Self-Correction
reasoning_self_correction.description: Patterns that reflect, verify, and iteratively improve answers

architectural.label: Architectural Patterns
architectural.description: Structural approaches for composing RAG pipelines

patterns.name: Naive RAG
patterns.source_paper: Lewis et al., 'Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks', NeurIPS 2020
patterns.core_concept: Chunk documents → embed chunks → store in vector DB → embed query → retrieve top-k → generate answer
patterns.key_innovation: Baseline: combines parametric (LLM) + non-parametric (retriever) knowledge
fintech_use_cases: FAQ answering over product documentation
Basic policy document Q&A
Customer support knowledge base
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What are the eligibility requirements for a personal loan?
common_failure_modes: Chunk boundary cuts important context
Semantic drift between query and answer phrasing
No handling for unanswerable questions
patterns.primary_goal: Baseline: combines parametric (LLM) + non-parametric (retriever) knowledge

patterns.name: Advanced RAG
patterns.source_paper: Gao et al., 'Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large Language Models: A Survey', 2023
patterns.core_concept: Pre-retrieval (query rewriting/expansion) + post-retrieval (re-ranking, context compression)
patterns.key_innovation: Adds processing stages before and after retrieval to fix naive RAG failures
fintech_use_cases: Regulatory document search with query expansion
Re-ranked risk report retrieval
Compressed context for earnings call Q&A
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What capital requirements apply to tier 1 banks under Basel III?
common_failure_modes: Over-compressed context loses key details
Query rewriting changes user intent
Re-ranker adds 300–600ms latency
notebook_cells_outline: Query rewriting: LLM generates 3 query variants
patterns.primary_goal: Adds processing stages before and after retrieval to fix naive RAG failures

patterns.name: Hybrid RAG
patterns.source_paper: Ma et al., 'Hybrid Search with BM25 and Dense Retrieval', 2023
patterns.core_concept: BM25 sparse retrieval + dense vector retrieval fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
patterns.key_innovation: Combines exact keyword matching with semantic similarity for maximum recall
fintech_use_cases: Regulatory text search (exact clause references + semantic context)
Contract review (exact term lookup + conceptual search)
SWIFT/ISO messaging standard lookup
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Find all references to 'margin call' triggers in the ISDA agreement
common_failure_modes: RRF weight tuning required per domain
BM25 index doesn't update incrementally
Two separate indexes to maintain
notebook_cells_outline: Compare: BM25-only vs dense-only vs hybrid
patterns.primary_goal: Combines exact keyword matching with semantic similarity for maximum recall

patterns.name: RAG Fusion
patterns.source_paper: Shi et al., 'RAG-Fusion: A New Take on Retrieval-Augmented Generation', 2024
patterns.core_concept: LLM generates N query variants → retrieve for each → merge all results via RRF → generate
patterns.key_innovation: Multi-perspective querying exposes docs that a single query would miss
fintech_use_cases: Comprehensive risk exposure queries (synonyms: exposure, liability, risk)
AML pattern detection across varied terminology
Multi-angle regulatory compliance checks
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What are the reporting obligations for suspicious transactions?
common_failure_modes: N * retrieval cost — gets expensive at scale
LLM-generated queries can drift from user intent
Duplicate chunks in fused results without dedup
notebook_cells_outline: RRF fusion across all result sets
patterns.primary_goal: Multi-perspective querying exposes docs that a single query would miss

patterns.name: Multi-Query RAG
patterns.source_paper: LangChain MultiQueryRetriever documentation + underlying research, 2023
patterns.core_concept: Generate 3–5 query perspectives → retrieve for each → union + deduplicate results
patterns.key_innovation: Compensates for embedding space limitations by generating diverse phrasings
fintech_use_cases: Portfolio risk queries phrased multiple ways
Customer complaint categorization
Insurance policy coverage lookup
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Can I get a refund on my investment product?
common_failure_modes: Generates semantically similar (not diverse) queries
Union of results can overwhelm context window
No scoring across perspectives
notebook_cells_outline: MultiQueryRetriever with Claude as query generator
patterns.primary_goal: Compensates for embedding space limitations by generating diverse phrasings

patterns.name: HyDE (Hypothetical Document Embeddings)
patterns.source_paper: Gao et al., 'Precise Zero-Shot Dense Retrieval without Relevance Labels', ACL 2023
patterns.core_concept: Generate a hypothetical ideal answer → embed it → use that embedding to retrieve real docs
patterns.key_innovation: Bridges the gap between short query embeddings and long document embeddings
fintech_use_cases: Zero-shot retrieval over new regulatory domains
Low-query-volume product FAQs
First-time domain coverage without training data
patterns.workshop_demo_query: How does open banking affect data sharing consent?
common_failure_modes: Hypothetical answer can hallucinate facts
Works less well when LLM knows nothing about domain
Double LLM call adds latency
notebook_cells_outline: Compare: query embedding vs HyDE embedding
patterns.primary_goal: Bridges the gap between short query embeddings and long document embeddings

patterns.name: Step-Back RAG
patterns.source_paper: Zheng et al., 'Take a Step Back: Evoking Reasoning via Abstraction in Large Language Models', ICLR 2024
patterns.core_concept: Rewrite query to a higher-level abstraction → retrieve on abstract query → use for grounded generation
patterns.key_innovation: Handles overly specific queries by finding the general principle first
fintech_use_cases: Specific tax code questions → general tax principles
Edge-case insurance claims → general coverage rules
Niche derivative product queries → general instrument class
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Is a knock-in barrier option with a 0.65 delta ITM at expiry exercisable?
common_failure_modes: Step-back abstraction can be too vague
Loses important specifics from original query
Requires LLM with strong abstraction capability
notebook_cells_outline: Abstraction prompt: rewrite to general form
patterns.primary_goal: Handles overly specific queries by finding the general principle first

patterns.name: FLARE (Forward-Looking Active Retrieval)
patterns.source_paper: Jiang et al., 'Active Retrieval Augmented Generation', EMNLP 2023
patterns.core_concept: Generate tentative next tokens; if confidence below threshold, pause and retrieve before continuing
patterns.key_innovation: Retrieval is triggered dynamically during generation, not just at the start
fintech_use_cases: Long-form regulatory report generation with on-demand fact retrieval
Dynamic earnings commentary generation
Multi-paragraph risk narrative with embedded citations
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Write a 3-paragraph risk summary for our Q3 credit portfolio.
common_failure_modes: Token probability access not available in all APIs
Can loop excessively on low-confidence domains
Latency increases significantly with multiple retrieval pauses
patterns.primary_goal: Retrieval is triggered dynamically during generation, not just at the start

patterns.name: Ensemble RAG
patterns.source_paper: LangChain EnsembleRetriever + foundational ensemble IR literature
patterns.core_concept: Run multiple independent retrievers (BM25, dense, graph) and combine results via weighted voting
patterns.key_innovation: Robustness through diversity — no single retriever failure tanks the whole pipeline
fintech_use_cases: Multi-source regulatory intelligence (FINRA + SEC + CFTC)
Cross-asset risk data retrieval
Vendor-agnostic document search
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What sanctions screening requirements apply to correspondent banking?
common_failure_modes: Weight tuning required — wrong weights can hurt
Parallel retrieval adds infra complexity
Inconsistent document formats across retrievers
patterns.primary_goal: Robustness through diversity — no single retriever failure tanks the whole pipeline

patterns.name: Parent Document Retrieval
patterns.source_paper: LangChain ParentDocumentRetriever pattern, Harrison Chase, 2023
patterns.core_concept: Index small child chunks for precision retrieval; at query time return the full parent chunk for rich context
patterns.key_innovation: Separates retrieval granularity from generation context size
fintech_use_cases: Long compliance documents: retrieve specific clause, return full article
Prospectus Q&A: find sentence, return full section
Annual report navigation
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What does the document say about early repayment penalties?
common_failure_modes: Parent chunks can overflow context window if too large
Requires two storage tiers (vector DB + doc store)
Parent boundary choice is critical
notebook_cells_outline: Split into parent (512 tokens) + child (128 token) chunks
Store: child embeddings in Chroma, parents in InMemoryStore
patterns.primary_goal: Separates retrieval granularity from generation context size

patterns.name: Sentence Window Retrieval
patterns.source_paper: LlamaIndex SentenceWindowNodeParser, Jerry Liu, 2023
patterns.core_concept: Embed individual sentences for precise matching; at retrieval expand to surrounding ±k sentence window
patterns.key_innovation: Fine-grained embedding precision with rich generation context
fintech_use_cases: Term sheet extraction: find exact clause, return paragraph
Earnings call transcript search
KYC document sentence-level fact lookup
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What is the interest rate reset mechanism in this term sheet?
common_failure_modes: Window boundary can cut important context
Sentence segmentation errors affect indexing
Metadata replacement adds complexity
patterns.primary_goal: Fine-grained embedding precision with rich generation context

patterns.name: RAPTOR
patterns.source_paper: Sarthi et al., 'RAPTOR: Recursive Abstractive Processing for Tree-Organized Retrieval', ICLR 2024
patterns.core_concept: Cluster leaf chunks → summarize clusters → build tree → query at any abstraction level
patterns.key_innovation: Enables both detail retrieval and high-level thematic retrieval from the same index
fintech_use_cases: Annual report: high-level themes + specific figures
Regulatory corpus: overarching rules + specific clauses
Multi-document fund prospectus analysis
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What are the main risk themes across all our fund prospectuses?
common_failure_modes: UMAP + clustering is non-deterministic
Summary quality depends heavily on LLM
Tree can get very deep for large corpora
patterns.primary_goal: Enables both detail retrieval and high-level thematic retrieval from the same index

patterns.name: Contextual RAG
patterns.source_paper: Anthropic, 'Introducing Contextual Retrieval', Technical Blog, 2024
patterns.core_concept: For each chunk, use Claude to generate a short context summary of where it sits in the doc, then prepend to chunk before embedding
patterns.key_innovation: Chunk embeddings now encode document-level context, drastically reducing retrieval failures
fintech_use_cases: Long regulatory documents where clause meaning depends on earlier definitions
Multi-section loan agreements
Sequential policy documents with cross-references
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What are the consequences of missing a scheduled payment under Section 7?
common_failure_modes: Context generation adds per-chunk LLM cost at index time
Context quality varies — short docs need less context
Prompt caching essential for cost control
notebook_cells_outline: Context generation: Claude situates each chunk
Retrieve and compare: plain chunks vs contextualized
Fintech: contract clause with cross-reference awareness

eval_criteria.context_generated: all(chunk.context is not None for chunk in chunks)

patterns.primary_goal: Chunk embeddings now encode document-level context, drastically reducing retrieval failures

patterns.name: Multi-Vector RAG
patterns.source_paper: LangChain MultiVectorRetriever, 2023
patterns.core_concept: Store multiple embeddings per document: full text, summary, and hypothetical questions, all pointing to the same source doc
patterns.key_innovation: Different query types match different embeddings of the same document
fintech_use_cases: Product docs: retrieve by name, description, or FAQ format
Research reports: match by title, abstract, or findings
Policy docs: match intent-based or clause-based queries
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What investment products have capital protection?
common_failure_modes: Storage overhead 3x per document
Summary generation adds index-time cost
Hypothetical questions can drift from actual content
notebook_cells_outline: Generate: summary + hypothetical questions per doc
Embed all vectors → InMemoryByteStore for doc lookup
Compare: which vector type matches best per query style
patterns.primary_goal: Different query types match different embeddings of the same document

patterns.name: Long-Context RAG
patterns.source_paper: Anthropic Claude 200k context + 'Lost in the Middle', Liu et al., ACL 2024
patterns.core_concept: Retrieve broadly (top-20 to top-50) and stuff all retrieved context into 100k+ context window; no chunking needed
patterns.key_innovation: Eliminates chunk boundary failures; lets LLM reason holistically over all context
fintech_use_cases: Full 10-K annual report analysis
Entire regulatory rulebook Q&A
Complete audit trail review
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Summarize all risk factors mentioned in this 10-K filing.
common_failure_modes: 'Lost in the middle' — LLM ignores middle of context
High cost per query
Still needs retrieval for very large corpora
notebook_cells_outline: Mitigation: reorder chunks by relevance score
patterns.primary_goal: Eliminates chunk boundary failures; lets LLM reason holistically over all context

patterns.name: Self-RAG
patterns.source_paper: Asai et al., 'Self-RAG: Learning to Retrieve, Generate, and Critique through Self-Reflection', NeurIPS 2023
patterns.core_concept: Model generates special reflection tokens (ISREL, ISSUP, ISUSE) to decide whether to retrieve, whether retrieved doc is relevant, and whether the generation is grounded
patterns.key_innovation: Turns retrieval decision into part of the generation process, not a fixed preprocessing step
fintech_use_cases: Compliance answers that must cite specific regulations
Audit-trail generation with grounded citations
Decisions that need to flag when insufficient data
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Is this transaction pattern consistent with known money laundering typologies?
common_failure_modes: Original paper requires fine-tuned model for reflection tokens
Approximated with prompted LLM — less precise
Can reject all retrieved docs and still generate (hallucinate)
notebook_cells_outline: Implement RETRIEVE decision token with Claude
patterns.primary_goal: Turns retrieval decision into part of the generation process, not a fixed preprocessing step

patterns.name: Corrective RAG (CRAG)
patterns.source_paper: Yan et al., 'Corrective Retrieval Augmented Generation', ICLR 2024
patterns.core_concept: Grade retrieved documents for relevance; if below threshold fall back to web search and knowledge refinement before generation
patterns.key_innovation: Detects and corrects bad retrieval in-loop without human intervention
fintech_use_cases: Real-time regulatory lookups where internal docs may be outdated
Market data queries with web fallback
Compliance Q&A needing verified current regulation
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What is the current Dodd-Frank reporting threshold for swap dealers?
common_failure_modes: Web search fallback adds latency and cost
Grader threshold tuning required per domain
Web results may be less structured than internal docs
notebook_cells_outline: Setup with Tavily web search API
Fintech: compliance query with web fallback
patterns.primary_goal: Detects and corrects bad retrieval in-loop without human intervention

patterns.name: IRCoT (Interleaved Retrieval + CoT)
patterns.source_paper: Trivedi et al., 'Interleaving Retrieval with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Knowledge-Intensive Multi-Step Questions', ACL 2023
patterns.core_concept: Alternate between chain-of-thought reasoning steps and retrieval steps; each CoT sentence can trigger a new retrieval
patterns.key_innovation: Reasoning and retrieval inform each other iteratively rather than retrieval being one-shot
fintech_use_cases: Multi-step credit risk assessment (income → credit history → debt ratio → decision)
Sequential regulatory compliance checks
Complex financial product suitability assessment
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Is this client eligible for a tier-3 structured product given their investment history and current risk profile?
common_failure_modes: Can loop excessively for simple queries
Cost grows with number of CoT steps
Reasoning trace can drift from original question
notebook_cells_outline: Data: suitability rules + client profile docs
IRCoT loop: CoT → detect trigger → retrieve → continue CoT
Produce final answer with reasoning trace
patterns.primary_goal: Reasoning and retrieval inform each other iteratively rather than retrieval being one-shot

patterns.name: Speculative RAG
patterns.source_paper: Wang et al., 'Speculative RAG: Enhancing Retrieval Augmented Generation through Drafting', 2024
patterns.core_concept: Draft a speculative answer using a small LLM without retrieval; retrieve docs to verify/correct it with a larger LLM
patterns.key_innovation: Reduces latency on easy queries by using retrieval only for verification not generation
fintech_use_cases: High-volume FAQ answering with accuracy verification
Fast first-response with compliance check
Draft financial summaries with fact verification
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What are the standard T+2 settlement rules for equities?
common_failure_modes: Draft can confidently hallucinate, confusing the verifier
Two model calls required even for simple queries
Verification LLM may not correct draft strongly enough
notebook_cells_outline: Data: settlement rules and market structure docs
Draft generation: haiku model, no retrieval
Retrieve: top-5 docs for the query
Latency analysis: speculative vs standard RAG
patterns.primary_goal: Reduces latency on easy queries by using retrieval only for verification not generation

patterns.name: Adaptive RAG
patterns.source_paper: Jeong et al., 'Adaptive-RAG: Learning to Adapt Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Models through Question Complexity', NAACL 2024
patterns.core_concept: Classify query complexity first; route to no-retrieval (simple), single-step RAG (medium), or multi-step RAG (complex)
patterns.key_innovation: Right tool for the right query — avoids over-engineering simple questions
fintech_use_cases: Mixed-complexity financial assistant (simple balance check → complex portfolio analysis)
Customer service triage
Regulatory query routing
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Route these 5 queries and show the routing decisions.
common_failure_modes: Classifier errors route complex queries to simple path
Classification adds latency for all queries
Boundary between complexity tiers is fuzzy
notebook_cells_outline: Build complexity classifier (0 = no retrieval, 1 = single, 2 = multi)
patterns.primary_goal: Right tool for the right query — avoids over-engineering simple questions

patterns.name: Modular RAG
patterns.source_paper: Gao et al., 'Modular RAG: Transforming RAG Systems into LEGO-like Reconfigurable Frameworks', 2024
patterns.core_concept: Decompose RAG into independent, swappable modules (indexing, retrieval, reranking, generation) that can be combined like building blocks
patterns.key_innovation: Each component is independently upgradeable and testable — enterprise-grade pipeline design
fintech_use_cases: Production RAG pipelines requiring A/B testing of components
Multi-team ownership of different pipeline stages
Compliance-enforced component substitutability
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Swap the retriever and re-ranker components live and compare results.
common_failure_modes: Interface contracts between modules must be strict
More code to maintain than a monolithic pipeline
Debugging requires tracing across module boundaries
notebook_cells_outline: Define module interface: Retriever, Reranker, Generator protocols
patterns.primary_goal: Each component is independently upgradeable and testable — enterprise-grade pipeline design

patterns.name: Agentic RAG
patterns.source_paper: Anthropic + LangGraph Agentic RAG pattern, 2024
patterns.core_concept: ReAct agent with retrieval tool(s) — agent decides which tools to call, in what order, across multiple steps
patterns.key_innovation: Retrieval becomes a tool call in an agentic loop, not a fixed preprocessing step
fintech_use_cases: Complex multi-source financial analysis (Bloomberg + internal docs + regulatory DB)
Portfolio construction with multi-step reasoning
Fraud investigation agent
patterns.workshop_demo_query: Analyze whether this client's portfolio is aligned with their stated ESG preferences and risk tolerance.
common_failure_modes: Agent can loop excessively without stopping condition
Tool selection errors are hard to debug
Higher cost from multiple LLM calls
notebook_cells_outline: Data: client profile + ESG ratings DB + portfolio holdings
patterns.primary_goal: Retrieval becomes a tool call in an agentic loop, not a fixed preprocessing step

patterns.name: Multi-Hop RAG
patterns.source_paper: Yang et al., 'HotpotQA: A Dataset for Diverse, Explainable Multi-hop Question Answering', EMNLP 2018
patterns.core_concept: Each retrieved document provides a bridge entity that seeds the next retrieval hop; chain continues until the full reasoning path is complete
patterns.key_innovation: Answers questions that require connecting information spread across multiple documents
fintech_use_cases: Counterparty risk: company → parent entity → jurisdiction → regulatory rules
Supply chain finance: supplier → buyer → creditworthiness chain
KYC chain: individual → company → UBO → sanctions list
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What sanctions regulations apply to the ultimate beneficial owner of TechCorp Ltd?
common_failure_modes: Bridge entity extraction can fail on ambiguous names
Hop limit required to prevent infinite loops
Latency grows linearly with hop count
notebook_cells_outline: Data: corporate hierarchy docs + sanctions DB
Multi-hop retrieval loop with hop limit=3
Final generation with full chain context
patterns.primary_goal: Answers questions that require connecting information spread across multiple documents

patterns.name: Graph RAG
patterns.source_paper: Edge et al., 'From Local to Global: A Graph RAG Approach to Query-Focused Summarization', Microsoft Research, 2024
patterns.core_concept: Extract entities and relationships from docs into a knowledge graph; combine graph traversal with vector search for richer retrieval
patterns.key_innovation: Captures entity relationships and global document themes that pure vector search misses
fintech_use_cases: Counterparty network risk: entity relationships + exposure data
Regulatory knowledge graph (rules → entities → obligations)
Financial statement relationship extraction
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What entities are connected to the Lehman Brothers bankruptcy and what were the downstream exposures?
common_failure_modes: Graph construction is slow and expensive
Entity disambiguation is hard
Graph schema design is critical and domain-specific
notebook_cells_outline: Graph traversal: local (entity neighborhood) + global (community summaries)
patterns.primary_goal: Captures entity relationships and global document themes that pure vector search misses

patterns.name: Multi-Modal RAG
patterns.source_paper: Chen et al., 'MMRet: Multi-Modal Retrieval with Vision-Language Models', 2024
patterns.core_concept: Index and retrieve images, tables, and charts alongside text; use vision-language models for cross-modal queries
patterns.key_innovation: Answers questions that require understanding charts, tables, or figures in documents
fintech_use_cases: PDF financial report Q&A with chart understanding
Prospectus table extraction and querying
Trading dashboard screenshot analysis
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What does the revenue trend chart show for Q3 2024 in this earnings PDF?
common_failure_modes: Image extraction from PDFs can be lossy
Table parsing accuracy varies by PDF quality
Vision model calls are expensive
notebook_cells_outline: Data: earnings PDF with charts and tables
Embed: text via OpenAI, images via Claude vision descriptions
patterns.primary_goal: Answers questions that require understanding charts, tables, or figures in documents

patterns.name: Temporal RAG
patterns.source_paper: Dhingra et al., 'Time-Aware Language Models as Temporal Knowledge Bases', TACL 2022
patterns.core_concept: Attach timestamps to all indexed documents; apply time-decay weighting or hard time-filters at retrieval; version-aware indexing for changing docs
patterns.key_innovation: Prevents stale regulatory or market data from appearing in answers; enables time-scoped queries
fintech_use_cases: Regulatory change tracking (retrieve latest version of a rule)
Market data Q&A with time-bounded context
Policy document versioning and audit trail
patterns.workshop_demo_query: What was the capital adequacy requirement before and after the 2023 Basel IV update?
common_failure_modes: Timestamps missing from many documents
Hard time filters can exclude still-valid older docs
Recency bias can miss historically important docs
patterns.primary_goal: Prevents stale regulatory or market data from appearing in answers; enables time-scoped queries
